title: Terms & Conditions
seoDescription: The terms and conditions governing the use of the Sandhurst Roofing website and our services.
content:
Welcome

These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of the Sandhurst Roofing website (sandhurstroofing.com.au) and any services we provide. By using our website or engaging Sandhurst Roofing Pty Ltd ("Sandhurst Roofing", "we", "us", "our") for roofing work, you agree to these Terms.

Use of This Website

The content on this website is for general information about our roofing services. You may use the site to browse our work, read our blog, or contact us for a quote.

You agree not to:

  • Use the site for any unlawful purpose
  • Attempt to interfere with the website's operation or security
  • Copy, reproduce, or republish content from this site without our written permission, except for personal, non-commercial use

Quotes and Estimates

Any quote we provide is an estimate based on the information available at the time of inspection or enquiry. Final pricing may vary based on:

  • Unforeseen site conditions (e.g., hidden damage, asbestos, structural issues)
  • Changes you request after the quote is issued
  • Material price changes between the quote date and work commencement

Quotes are valid for 30 days from the date of issue unless otherwise stated.

Work Performed

All work is performed by licensed and insured tradespeople. We take reasonable care to complete work to a professional standard. Specific warranties (manufacturer or workmanship) will be detailed in writing on your quote or invoice.

Payment Terms

Payment terms are agreed in advance and will be set out on your quote or invoice. Late payments may incur interest charges or recovery costs at our discretion and as permitted by law.

Cancellations

If you need to cancel or reschedule work, please contact us as soon as possible. We reserve the right to charge a reasonable fee for materials already purchased or work commenced.

Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, our liability is limited to the cost of the services provided. We are not liable for any indirect, consequential, or incidental damages.

Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits any rights you have under the Australian Consumer Law that cannot lawfully be excluded or limited.

Intellectual Property

All content on this website (text, images, logo, branding) is owned by or licensed to Sandhurst Roofing. You may not use our content for commercial purposes without our written permission.

Privacy

Your use of our services and this website is also governed by our Privacy Policy.

Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Victoria, Australia. Any disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Victoria.

Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. The current version will always be available at this page.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

  • Phone: 0448 812 800
  • Email: info@sandhurstroofing.com.au
